checklistName: Manual Update Local Launch Operation Checklist

manualPcUpdateSteps.label: Run git switch main after GitHub merge is confirmed.
Run git pull origin main manually from the private repository.
Run git status and confirm the working tree is clean.
Open private-local.html manually for local operation.

ipadReviewSteps.label: Use the GitHub app or browser to review the private repository.
Do not require GitHub Pages for iPad review.

securitySoftwarePolicy.label: If Norton blocks a file, do not force allow it.
Do not reuse blocked or quarantined files.

operationPrinciples: Manual update is preferred over rollback when security software is involved.
Safety confirmation is prioritized before recovery or re-run attempts.
Private repository, local first, and no GitHub Pages dependency remain the operating premise.
nextRecommendedStep: After merge, update PC manually with git switch main, git pull origin main, git status, then open private-local.html manually.
